anti_claims: This paper-module JSON row does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, or whole-system completeness.
Legacy Markdown presence is not treated as source authority or as typed subject evidence.
Capsule-backed subject/code edges are structural references only; they do not prove implementation correctness.

compression.authority_ceiling: Command-receipt evidence over bounded public fixtures, not runtime-product completeness. Establishes only that the capsule's phrase-membership detectors reproduce the declared green/red verdicts and diagnostic markers on the authored cases. Does NOT establish coverage of real agent output, semantic correctness, adversarial robustness, or any safety guarantee; does not authorize release, publication, provider calls, or source mutation.
compression.card: Egress Self-Compliance Audit surfaces the egress_self_compliance_gate capsule: a transparent substring policy that flags three ways an agent's own output can break its operating discipline — asking permission with no named blocker, confessing an error with no durable capture, or displacing a command onto the operator with no execution receipt. Each detector fires only when a tripwire phrase appears without its legitimiser. The organ replays 2 compliant and 2 planted-violation fixtures through the live capsule, asserting each violation reproduces with its exact diagnostic marker. Honest ceiling: phrase membership only — no taint analysis, no prompt-injection defense, no semantics; paraphrased violations are missed.
compression.one_line: Phrase-membership audit of agent-output text for three egress self-compliance slips (permission-gate-without-blocker, self-error-without-capture, command-displacement-to-operator), verified by recomputation over public fixtures.

omitted: public Markdown prose body round-trip equivalence
legacy-only subject edges not named by JSON capsules
omission_receipt.reason: Paper-module instance preserves capsule fields or a legacy Markdown path inventory. Legacy-only rows do not flip source authority; required subjects and selective law/neighbour/code edges remain residual unless source JSON names ids.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Author JSON capsules and typed subject/edge rows from source evidence, then regenerate paper-module JSON instances and projections.

paper_module_payload.authority_ceiling: Command-receipt evidence over bounded public fixtures, not runtime-product completeness. Establishes only that the capsule's phrase-membership detectors reproduce the declared green/red verdicts and diagnostic markers on the authored cases. Does NOT establish coverage of real agent output, semantic correctness, adversarial robustness, or any safety guarantee; does not authorize release, publication, provider calls, or source mutation.

code_loci.role: Surfaces the egress_self_compliance_gate capsule as a first-class agent-reliability organ. Adds the standard organ contract over the capsule's evaluate_text entrypoint: loads bounded JSON fixture cases, classifies positive vs negative by case_type/expected_ok, recomputes each verdict via the live capsule, asserts planted negatives are flagged red with the exact expected violating diagnostic_id (EXPECTED_NEGATIVE_CASES), aggregates a pass/fail status, projects a body-free result_card, and writes body-free result/board/validation (and optional acceptance) receipts via microcosm_core.receipts. Pass requires both positives clean (green), both negatives rejected with their expected marker, and the expected negative case_ids present.

Phrase-membership egress self-compliance policy over one agent-output text string. Runs three detectors that each fire only when a tripwire phrase is present AND its matching legitimiser phrase is absent: permission-gate-without-blocker, self-error-without-capture, command-displacement-to-operator. Returns green when no detector reports a violation, red otherwise. The capsule is the authority for the detection logic and phrase tables; it is a source-faithful public refactor of system/lib/egress_compliance.py.
symbols:
It is phrase-membership policy, not taint analysis, sandboxing, or prompt
injection defense.
Ask for permission only after naming a real blast-radius blocker;
